name: libosmosdr0
title: libosmosdr0
summary: Software defined radio support for OsmoSDR hardware (library)
description:
Software defined radio support for OsmoSDR hardware (library)
OsmoSDR is a 100% Free Software based small form-factor inexpensive
SDR (Software Defined Radio) project.
.
The hardware part of OsmoSDR brings information from an antenna connector
to a USB plug.
.
This package is the software that provides control of the USB hardware
and an API to pass data to software defined radio applications on the host.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libosmosdr0 because Software defined radio support for OsmoSDR hardware (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libosmosdr0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libosmosdr0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libosmosdr0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
